home.title: Hi, I'm
home.subtitle: Full Stack & Mobile Developer
home.aboutMe: I'm a Full Stack & Mobile engineer with 3+ years building scalable products with React, React Native, Next.js and Node.js.
home.description: I've been part of development teams at companies like CC Orbit, Pitchdb and Mrulex.Ou, working both in agile squads and as a freelancer — always focused on performance, security and clean code.

about.title: Hi, I'm Jose Martinez
about.subtitle: Professional journey
about.heroDesc1: I'm a Full Stack & Mobile developer with over 3 years of experience building modern web and mobile applications with React, React Native, Next.js and Node.js.
about.heroDesc2: I specialize in scalable solution development, performance optimization and RESTful API integration with secure JWT authentication. I have worked on international projects focused on code quality, security and user experience.
about.profileDescription: Result-driven developer specialized in the JavaScript ecosystem, RESTful API design and AI-assisted delivery.
about.frontendSkills: React, Next.js, Redux Toolkit, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3.
about.mobileSkills: React Native, Android performance tuning, native module integration and multi-platform releases.
about.backendSkills: Node.js, Express.js, RESTful APIs, secure authentication with JWT.
about.aiSkills: ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Claude, Gemini, GPT-4, LLaMA to speed up delivery.
about.devopsSkills: Git, GitHub, semantic versioning and cloud deployments.

job1.title: Full Stack & Mobile Developer
job1.achievement1: Developed cross-platform mobile apps with React Native, making key technical decisions, and implementing enhancements with web support.
job1.achievement2: Designed SQL/MariaDB data architectures to ensure data integrity.
job1.achievement3: Implemented native features and optimizations that boosted Android performance.
job1.achievement4: Built backend business logic to keep the platform scalable.

job2.title: Full Stack Developer
job2.achievement1: Delivered critical Next.js and Node.js features cutting response times by 40%.
job2.achievement2: Implemented JWT-based authentication that reinforced platform security.
job2.achievement3: Refactored React components to improve maintainability and scalability.
job2.achievement4: Optimized UI performance reducing load times by up to 30%.

job3.title: Frontend Developer
job3.achievement1: Crafted responsive interfaces in React and Next.js for the legaltech platform.
job3.achievement2: Managed global state with Redux Toolkit to keep experiences consistent.
job3.achievement3: Partnered with backend teams to integrate secure RESTful APIs.
job3.achievement4: Performed performance audits that cut load times by 30%.

job4.title: Freelance Web Developer
job4.achievement1: Built tailored web applications for international clients using React and Node.js.
job4.achievement2: Handled MongoDB databases end-to-end plus cloud deployments.
job4.achievement3: Guided architectural decisions to keep products maintainable.
job4.achievement4: Automated delivery workflows using AI-driven tools.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting

desapego.title: Desapego
desapego.description: Second-hand clothing marketplace built with Next.js. Features product listings by category, brand discovery, seller profiles, cart, and a full circular-fashion e-commerce experience.

raiz.title: RAÍZ
raiz.description: Carbon footprint management platform for companies. Automates CO₂ calculation, issues verifiable digital certificates, enables real tree compensation with QR traceability, and includes a React Native mobile app.

ruleta.title: Ruleta Club
ruleta.description: Online roulette simulator community. Real-time gameplay emulation, live chat, global ranking tournaments, and user authentication — the largest roulette-player community platform.

iptracker.title: IP Address Tracker
iptracker.description: React + Vite app that geolocalizes any IP address or domain in real time. Displays location, timezone and ISP on an interactive Leaflet map powered by the ipify API.

coingecko.title: Crypto Market Tracker
coingecko.description: React app consuming the CoinGecko public API to display a real-time ranking of the top 100 cryptocurrencies with price, 24 h change and market cap data.

xveritas.title: Xveritas
xveritas.description: Legal services website for a Colombian law firm specializing in traffic procedures: fines, vehicle release, SIMIT updates, license renewals and insolvency. Built with a focus on responsive design and clear UX.

pitchdb.title: PitchDB
pitchdb.description: Full Stack contributor on a SaaS platform for podcast and press outreach. Delivered critical Next.js and Node.js features cutting response times by 40%, implemented JWT authentication and optimized React UI performance by 30%.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's build your next product

contact.emailSubject: Hi Jose, let's talk about a new project
contact.formHelper: Drop me a quick note and I'll respond within a day.
